text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow's going to be my last race with Orfe-san…? 
Whatever do ya mean?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
We still haven't figured anything out… 
…Ya don't mean… ya want me to give up, do ya?
choice_data_list: <size=32>No. I figured it out… And I know you can end this.</size>
<size=32>No. I figured it out… And I know you can end this.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
! 
Wait, so…
choice_data_list: Lala. ——You gotta freak it!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Pardon?
choice_data_list: <size=36>Put your hands in the air like you just don't care!</size>
<size=36>Put your hands in the air like you just don't care!</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Trainer——
choice_data_list: And finally… JUST KINDA DO NOTHING!!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Now what d——
choice_data_list: STOP!! OKAY, GO! RUN!!
STOP!! OKAY, GO! RUN!!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(…What the heck are ya thinking? 
You're tellin' me to go run!? How am I supposed to do that…)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(——When you're actin' like a weirdo!? That was gonna be our 
big moment! …SO WHY'D YA START ACTIN' LIKE WE'RE GOIN' 
CLUBBIN'? AND THEN YA KILLED THE DANG VIBE ANYWAY!)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(IT DON'T MAKE NO SENSE! PLAIN AND SIMPLE!! 
Urgh, seriously, seriously, seriously, SERIOUSLY!)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: (WHAT'S YA FRIGGIN PROBLEEEEEEEEEEEEEM!!!)
choice_data_list: <size=36>(…! There it is! That unbelievable acceleration!)</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…Trainer…! 
Did I——
choice_data_list: Yeah, you just ran your absolute best!
Yeah, you just ran your absolute best!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
I did, didn't I!? But how did I manage to do that…? 
…What on earth did ya figure out? 
Something to do with what ya did before I ran…?
choice_data_list: It's simple—— You blew up at me!
It's simple—— You blew up at me!

text_block_list.text:
A foil blowing up on their fool reveals all their feelings in 
a big explosive release. In an effort to be a prim and proper 
star, she'd held all her emotions back. But because of that——
choice_data_list: <size=36>You were holding back your explosive racing, too.</size>

text_block_list.text:
As a racer, there were going to be times where she'd need to let her 
instincts loose. So if we found a way to set off an explosive 
emotional reaction, we could use that to boost her racing.
choice_data_list: So I'm going to act like a dummy for you!
So I'm going to act like a dummy for you!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
What kinda stupid logic is dat?!! 
…Oh.
choice_data_list: You've figured it out too, haven't you?
You've figured it out too, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: W-well, maybe I have… Though I have to say it's a bit of an odd idea… No, it's an incredibly odd idea.
choice_data_list: YIPPEEEEE!!!!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
That ain't a good thing! 
……Guh. H-heehee. Hee.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Er… That is to say, Trainer… 
Could we possibly discuss this in more detail——
choice_data_list: <size=32>Better question! Wanna form a comedy duo with me!?</size>
<size=32>Better question! Wanna form a comedy duo with me!?</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Can ya slow down!?
choice_data_list: <size=34>If it helps you run, I'm gonna keep goofing around!</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
I'm tellin' ya, dat's da part I don't get! 
Though……………… 
I guess that's all right.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Ya seem to be serious about this… Well, as serious as you can be. If we've come this far, we don't have a choice but to give this a shot.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: All right, tomorrow… We're gonna put an end to this long, long fight!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer… 
If ya please.
choice_data_list: Lala… To-daisy's the big day.
Lala… To-daisy's the big day.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Right.
choice_data_list:
<size=32>We're going to make Orfevre acknowledge
you with her own tu-lips.</size>

<size=32>We're going to make Orfevre acknowledge
you with her own tu-lips.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ………And?
choice_data_list: <size=32>Your power's in full bloom! You're lilacly to win this!</size>
<size=32>Your power's in full bloom! You're lilacly to win this!</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(Orfe-san's majesty… This pressure… No matter how many 
times we race, she always sends a shiver down my spine. 
But this time… There's something else on my mind——)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ("You're lilacly to win this!"!?!!!??)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(…Da flower puns sucked, sure… But puttin' that aside. 
What da heck was with da last one? 
I mean, really, that just ain't right——)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: (ARE YA TOO CHICKEN TO TELL ME I CAN WIIIIIIIIIN!!??)

At that moment, Lucky Lilac's legs unleashed an explosive power. 
——Her biggest burst of speed yet.

text_block_list.name: Orfevre
text_block_list.text: ——Satisfactory.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Huh…?

text_block_list.name: Orfevre
text_block_list.text:
'Tis thy loss. However… We perceived a supreme light within 
thee. That light is the flame of kings, passed down 
through the ages. ——Let it wane at thy peril, Lala.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…It's really over… 
I… I finally got Orfe-san's approval…!
choice_data_list: <size=32>She recognized the potential in your explosive racing.</size>
<size=32>She recognized the potential in your explosive racing.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Yes. If I learn to harness that explosivity, and combine 
it with my controlled racing… Then I can aim even higher. 
…I think that's what she wanted to tell me.
choice_data_list: <size=34>So basically—— You really do need me to act dumb!</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh, someone's confident! …Ahem. Well, either way, I got 
her approval because ya helped me. I really can't thank ya 
enough.
choice_data_list: <size=36>No… This was all your own perserverance.</size>
<size=36>No… This was all your own perserverance.</size>

text_block_list.text:
She persevered in controlling herself every day… Through her 
hard work pursuing her ideal beauty, she created a gap. 
A gap that gave her the potential to unleash that explosive speed.
choice_data_list: <size=32>You're incredible… So I want to keep on supporting you.</size>
<size=32>You're incredible… So I want to keep on supporting you.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Wh——
choice_data_list: <size=36>I promise I'll keep drawing out your potential.</size>
<size=36>I promise I'll keep drawing out your potential.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: …Of course.
choice_data_list: So please, be my comedy partner!
So please, be my comedy partner!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: The word you're lookin' for is TRAINEE!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……Haha… Ahahaha! …Well… I accept. Now then… 
I still have a lot to learn… But I'm honored to work with ya, 
if you'll have me.
choice_data_list: So, are we a team?
So, are we a team?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Of course… But don't forget, a team of trainer and trainee, 
all right? …Though I wouldn't mind doin' a bit of comedy every 
now and then.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
After all—— I don't think there's anyone else 
I could have such a fun back-and-forth with.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…And so ends the story of how we first met. 
What do ya think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Next time on "Lala-Lalala-Lalalala"!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
TOO MANY LAS! Okay, that does sound like it'd be fun to say, 
but still! If you're gonna say my name, say it properly!
choice_data_list: Ruckey-lyela… Licky Lie…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
I know ya know how to say it! Sure, it's a bit of a tongue 
twister, but still! Besides, we agreed ya'd call me something 
else, remember?
choice_data_list: ………Rickey? Lucky?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Everybody's happy☆ NO! …We agreed on "Luck", remember!? 
"Lala" is just too cute of a nickname for a foil.
choice_data_list: <size=42>Sorry, Luck. But I'm back to my senses now.</size>
<size=42>Sorry, Luck. But I'm back to my senses now.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: NOW? The show's basically already over! …So, anyway, that should give ya all a good idea of how this trainer-trainee comedy duo's takin' on the Twinkle Series.
choice_data_list: <size=42>We'll see you guys at Hanshin Racecourse.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Don't just decide that for 'em! 
——Yeah, I'm done! That's all, folks!
——Lala!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello, Ai-san. …Finished with training? 
Good work.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Mmhm. I saw your race back there. It was amazing. 
…No wonder everybody's got their eyes on you.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
With your skills, you can rack up wins like it's nothing. 
I'm sure I'm going to see you standing against me some time 
soon… BUT!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to lose! 
Not to you, or any other Umamusume that'll cross my path!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…
…Hehe. Hungry for victory as always, aren't ya. 
We'll continue this—— On the turf.
